title.en: DREDGING; SOIL-SHIFTING (winning peat E21C49/00)
General working methods with dredgers or soil-shifting machines (methods for making embankments E02D17/18; methods for mining E21C)
Dredgers; Soil-shifting machines (for special purposes E02F5/00; other machines or apparatus for mining E21C; tunnelling E21D)
hand-operated {; handheld soil shifting equipment acting by sucking E02F3/8891 (spades or rakes for agriculture or gardening purposes A01B)}
mechanically-driven
Dredgers or soil-shifting machines for special purposes
{for uncovering conduits}

{adapted for working ground under water not otherwise provided for (E02F3/081, E02F3/4131, E02F3/8833, E02F5/104, E02F5/125, E02F7/005, E02F7/023, E02F7/065, E02F9/026, E02F9/045, E02F9/06 take precedence)}
for digging trenches or ditches ({machines for making foundation slots E02F3/205, E02F3/475 take precedence}; agricultural ploughs for working ridges A01B13/02)
Machines for digging other holes in the soil (earth drilling E21)
for making embankments; for back-filling (in combination with trench excavators E02F5/12)
for cleaning watercourses or other ways {(stream regulation E02B3/02)}
Auxiliary apparatus, e.g. for thawing, cracking, blowing-up, or other preparatory treatment of the soil
Equipment for conveying or separating excavated material (barges adapted for carrying-away material from floating dredgers B63B35/28)
{conveying material from the underwater bottom (by pipelines E02F7/10; suction dredgers E02F3/88)}
Conveying equipment mounted on a dredger (conveyors in general B65G)
Loading devices mounted on a dredger or an excavator (loading devices in general B65G ){hopper dredgers, also equipment for unloading the hopper}

Delivery chutes or screening plants {or mixing plants} mounted on dredgers or excavators ({for back-filling E02F5/226 takes precedence}; separating equipment in general B03; delivery chutes in general B65G)
Pipelines for conveying excavated materials (pipes in general F16L; pipe-lines systems F17D {; conveying by liquid pressure B65G53/30})
Component parts of dredgers or soil-shifting machines, not restricted to one of the kinds covered by groups E02F3/00 - E02F7/00 (laying-out or take-up devices for trailing electric cables B66C)
{Devices for transporting the soil-shifting machines or excavators, e.g. by pushing them or by hitching them to a tractor}
{Pivot joint assemblies (in general F16C11/04)}

Travelling-gear, e.g. associated with slewing gears ({drives therefor E02F9/20}; for motor vehicles B60B, B60G; undercarriages for locomotives or railroad cars B61F; track-laying vehicles B62D; for cranes B66C23/18)
Floating substructures as supports {(floating installations with arrangements acting by a sucking or forcing effect E02F3/8833)}
Superstructures; Supports for superstructures {(arrangements for travelling gear, e.g. undercarriages for wheels, crawlers, caterpillars E02F9/02; for motor vehicles B62D25/00, B62D33/00)}

Booms {only for booms with cable suspension arrangements (for booms or manipulators with cable suspensions for suction pipes E02F3/905 takes precedence; for booms per se E02F3/38; E02F3/34 for bucket-arms)}; Cable suspensions
Cabins, platforms, or the like, for drivers ({for motor vehicles in general B62D33/06}, for cranes B66C13/54)
Counterweights {(for cranes B66C23/72, for tractors B62D49/085)}
Drives; Control devices (gearings in general F16H; controlling in general G05; electric multi-motor drives H02K, H02P)
Safety devices {, e.g. for preventing overload (E02F9/226 takes precedence)}
Indicating devices {(E02F5/145 takes precedence)}
Small metalwork for digging elements, e.g. teeth {scraper bits (ploughs for agriculture A01B15/00; teeth of harrows A01B23/02)}
